name: Extract Method Refactoring Pattern
problem: A method does too many things, making it hard to read, test, and reuse parts of the logic.
steps: Identify a coherent code block inside a large method.
Create a new method with a name that expresses intent.
Move the selected block into the new method.
Pass required inputs as parameters and return needed outputs.
Replace original block with a call to the extracted method and run tests.
